text: Being here, I am aware of my curiosity mixing with the collective focus of others around me. The space vibrates with intent and anticipation, offering both comfort and a sense of shared vulnerability. I am struck by the gentle tension between analytical thought and creative wonder—reminded that my journey, like that of others, is shaped as much by questions as by answers. Surrounded by evidence of inquiry and innovation, I feel quietly inspired and keen to both observe and participate further.
